evals.name: trigger-tests-not-running
evals.prompt: Why didn't the tests run after my change?

assertions.text: Explains the short-circuit table for non-code files and the dirty-list evaluation that determines when validation runs

evals.name: trigger-validation-pipeline
evals.prompt: How does the validation pipeline work?

assertions.text: Describes the format → lint → test battery, hook scripts, guard scripts, and git digest sentinel for change detection

evals.name: negative-api-route
evals.prompt: How do I add a new API route?

assertions.text: Does NOT trigger the hooks skill; API routing questions route to vue-ssr-architecture instead
